name: ai-native-cowork
description: Work-collaboration harness for Claude Code. /cowork-sprint (plan→execute sprint orchestrator) + /cowork-insights (AI session reports) + /cowork-commit (verbatim directive logs) + /cowork-doc-sync (+/cowork-doc-init) (repo docs/ organization) + /pdca-wf (single-feature PDCA via native Workflow, verify-to-100). Fully standalone.
author: ww-w-ai
